creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 201002
grass 7.4.4

A few new features and stability fixes, manual improvements, and a few language translations have been added.

The GRASS GIS 7.4.4 release provides more than 20 fixes and improvements with respect to the stable release 7.4.3.

This is our "QGIS friendship" release :) 

---

I also update USES for gnome and gl.
